MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-08-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
RAYMOND GUIDUCCI, IN PROPRIA PERSONA, (415)772-0940, DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY
CINDY LEE, ESQ.,(415)752-6070, FOR PLAINTIFF/OPPOSING PARTY, SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANT RAYMOND GUIDUCCI'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 (301/PJB/LB)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-24-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-24-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.
Cindy Lee, Esq. appeared for plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority.
Henry Kwan, property manager for the San Francisco Housing Authority, was placed under oath and testified.
No Appearance by defendant Raymond Guiducci.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial filed February 27, 2008.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---San Francisco Housing Authority Lease
Agreement dated 06/28/00---------------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Fourteen Day Notice to Pay Rent or
Surrender Possession dated 09/06/07----------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Declaration of Service of Fourteen Day Notice to Pay
Rent or Surrender Possession dated 09/20/07--------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority and against defendant RAYMOND GUIDUCCI as follows:

Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority shall recover from defendant RAYMOND GUIDUCCI Rent and Per Diem damages in the sum of $2,110.80, Costs in the amount of 200.00, for a Total Judgment for plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority in the amount of $2,310.80.
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 227 Bay Street, #109, San Francisco, CA 94133. The lease is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-19-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Henry Kwan, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority
Cindy Lee, Esq., counsel for plaintiff

Raymond Guiducci, defendant
Laura Chiera, Esq. by limited scope representation for defendant

Settlement conference held. Case did not settle. Trial date remains.

Judge Pro Tem Irving Pfeffer, Clerk Linda Fong, not reported (218)
